docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $90) SERVED NOV-13-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SEUPAUL, ANTHONY

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO DISMISS CASE WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-07-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-04-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JENNIFER TSE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANTHONY SEUPAUL IS PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $1833.00 (WHICH INCLUDES COSTS) TO THE PLAINTIFF. AN ELECTRONIC PAYMENT MADE BY ZELLE FOR $1833.00 AT THE END OF FEBRUARY 26, 2022. IF NO PAYMENT AN ADDITIONAL $200.00 PUNITIVE DAMAGE WILL BE AWARDED. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE MARCH-04-2022 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,385.00 FILED BY TSE, JENNIFER AS TO DEFENDANT SEUPAUL, ANTHONY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-07-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
